seoTitle: Upper Gundowring vs Upper Plenty — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Gundowring and Upper Plenty. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Gundowring vs Upper Plenty: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Gundowring and Upper Plenty.
heading: Upper Gundowring vs Upper Plenty — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Gundowring, Victoria and Upper Plenty, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Gundowring has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Upper Plenty (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Gundowring or Upper Plenty safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Gundowring has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Upper Plenty scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Gundowring scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Plenty scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Gundowring or Upper Plenty?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Gundowring has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
